# Kove

> AI automation and workflow tools for Canterbury trades and professional services businesses. Based in Christchurch, New Zealand.

Kove is a solo AI automation consultancy run by Balu Premkumar. I build custom automation tools, AI pipelines, and internal software for NZ businesses — primarily owner-operated trades and professional services companies in the Canterbury region with 5–20 staff.

## What I do

- **Workflow automation** — identifying manual, repetitive processes and replacing them with automated pipelines
- **AI integration** — adding AI (Claude, Whisper, local LLMs) to existing business workflows
- **Custom internal tools** — CRMs, dashboards, lead generation pipelines, document processing tools
- **Process efficiency** — saving 5–20 hours per week of manual work per business

## Who I work with

Canterbury and NZ trades businesses (builders, plumbers, electricians, engineers), professional services firms (accountants, consultants, health sector), and owner-operators who are losing time to repetitive manual work.

## Work examples

- Canterbury Lead Generator — scrapes 14 NZ directories, enriches with Claude, saves 6+ hours/week of manual research
- Forge CRM — custom kanban CRM replacing 3 SaaS subscriptions
- Voice Dictation tool — hotkey speech-to-text into any Windows app using Whisper
- Podcast Intelligence Pipeline — 7-stage AI pipeline (transcription → chapters → show notes → timestamps) with HIPC-compliant local backend for NZ health sector
